meaning: 奥克兰[美国加利福尼亚州西部港市]
examples: I have been doing community service work in Oakland for the past several years.
Is this plane going to Oakland?
The man who traveled to Auckland instead of Oakland didn't feel like laughing.
For instance, in Oakland, California, it takes a median 14 days to sell.
In Oakland, the current record holder for super-quick sales, prices wee up 31 percent.
